use_when: repo-safe validation should run before or after a change
public-boundary checks are part of the task
the current support slice needs explicit scope repair
the packet should move into ops ownership
teaching and support work should stop sharing one owner
a support packet needs an explicit handoff boundary
requires: one packet owner at a time

use_when: the right patch home is ambiguous
the nearest symptom may not be the recurrence-killing fix
a support repair needs explicit scope classification before implementation
an ops-shaped packet needs compact close-out evidence
managerial triage should stay inspectable after implementation
a runnable check or its absence should be explicit at close-out
requires: clear local-now work or a clear reason none existed
